title: A Rooftop Clash Against Kaido and Big Mom
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Law, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Luffy as The Worst Generation confronts Kaido and Big Mom on Onigashima.
scene: On the rooftop of Onigashima, the Worst Generation challenges Kaido and Big Mom directly, turning the raid into a clash against emperors.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "fire"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: "FLame Slice"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: gyaya Asaana AAhh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: That's Kin'Emon's attack!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: HEHE...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: It's mine now!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: PROME- TheUS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Oww OwwwwOWOW!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy!! Don't let your guard down even for a second!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't forget, we are up against two emperors!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who-?

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: "Shambles"!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Woah!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Tra- Guy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Hey, Straw hat....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just so you know...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had already planned on moving kin'emon and the others downstairs!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But you went and said that ....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Tra-Guy!! Send all of them below!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now it looks like I obeyed your orders!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: How does that even matter?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Trafalgar... and here I thought you'd finally become straw hat's Lockey.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: As if

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: doesn't really matter to me whether one SCRUB joins another though.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Promethes!! Burn them all to cINDERS!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Yes, Mama!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: "Heavenly Fireballs"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Okay, how about the first person who flinches is the scrub!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Like hell I'd agree to that, you idiot!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: suggesting a pointless game at a time like this...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is exactly why you fools will never become big shots!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fair enough, guess you two are the "scrubs" then.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: AARG!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What > the hell are you guys doing?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stand back, Linlin....!! I want to see how strong these brats are.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Playing with your food again, huh....!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Try not to get in my way, Kamazou the "Manslayer" ........!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There aren't many people with such a weird laugh.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA FA

summary: This part advances the Wano / Rooftop Battle storyline through 40 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
